import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut in_num = false
    mut sign = 1
    mut val = 0
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if in_num
          let doubled = sign * val * 2
          if first
            out = "#{doubled}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
          end
          in_num = false
          sign = 1
          val = 0
        end
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        sign = 0 - 1
        in_num = true
      else if b == 43 and not in_num
        sign = 1
        in_num = true
      else
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if in_num
      let doubled = sign * val * 2
      if first
        out = "#{doubled}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{doubled}"
      end
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
